fields.name: FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related fixed asset.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depreciation book that is assigned to the fixed asset.

fields.name: Depreciation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how depreciation is calculated for the depreciation book.

fields.name: Depreciation Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which depreciation of the fixed asset starts.

fields.name: Straight-Line %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to depreciate the fixed asset by the straight-line principle, but with a fixed yearly percentage.

fields.name: No. of Depreciation Years
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of the depreciation period, expressed in years.

fields.name: No. of Depreciation Months
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of the depreciation period, expressed in months.

fields.name: Fixed Depr. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies an amount to depreciate the fixed asset, by a fixed yearly amount.

fields.name: Declining-Balance %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to depreciate the fixed asset by the declining-balance principle, but with a fixed yearly percentage.

fields.name: Depreciation Table Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the depreciation table to use if you have selected the User-Defined option in the Depreciation Method field.

fields.name: Final Rounding Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the final rounding amount to use.

fields.name: Ending Book Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount to use as the ending book value.

fields.name: FA Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies which posting group is used for the depreciation book when posting fixed asset transactions.

fields.name: Depreciation Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which depreciation of the fixed asset ends.

fields.name: Acquisition Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total acquisition cost for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Depreciation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total depreciation for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Book Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the book value for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Proceeds on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total proceeds on disposal for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Gain/Loss
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total gain (credit) or loss (debit) for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Write-Down
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total LCY amount of write-down entries for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Appreciation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total appreciation for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Custom 1
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total LCY amount for custom 1 entries for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Custom 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total LCY amount for custom 2 entries for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Depreciable Basis
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depreciable basis amount for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Salvage Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated residual value of a fixed asset when it can no longer be used.

fields.name: Book Value on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total LCY amount of entries posted with the Book Value on Disposal posting type. Entries of this kind are created when you post disposal of a fixed asset to a depreciation book where the Gross method has been selected in the Disposal Calculation Method field.

fields.name: Maintenance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total maintenance cost for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Maintenance Code Filter
fields.tooltip:
Calculates the value in the Maintenance field as a FlowFilter.
You can only enter a value in this field by applying a FlowFilter.

fields.name: FA Posting Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Calculates the value in the FlowFields in the FA Depreciation Books window as a FlowFilter.
You can only enter a value in this field by applying a FlowFilter.

fields.name: Acquisition Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the FA posting date of the first posted acquisition cost.

fields.name: G/L Acquisition Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L posting date of the first posted acquisition cost.

fields.name: Disposal Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the fixed asset has been disposed of.

fields.name: Last Acquisition Cost Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage of acquisition cost that can be allocated when acquisition cost is posted.

fields.name: Last Depreciation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the FA posting date of the last posted depreciation.

fields.name: Last Write-Down Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the FA posting date of the last posted write-down.

fields.name: Last Appreciation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum that applies to appreciations.

fields.name: Last Custom 1 Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the FA posting date of the last posted custom 1 entry.

fields.name: Last Custom 2 Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the FA posting date of the last posted custom 2 entry.

fields.name: Last Salvage Value Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies if related salvage value entries are included in the batch job .

fields.name: FA Exchange Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies a decimal number, which will be used as an exchange rate when duplicating journal lines to this depreciation book.

fields.name: Fixed Depr. Amount below Zero
fields.tooltip: Specifies a positive amount if you have selected the Allow Depr. below Zero field in the depreciation book.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Shows the FA posting date of the last posted entry.

fields.name: First User-Defined Depr. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for the user-defined depreciation table if you have entered a code in the Depreciation Table Code field.

fields.name: Use FA Ledger Check
fields.tooltip: Specifies which checks to perform before posting a journal line.

fields.name: Last Maintenance Date
fields.tooltip: Shows the FA posting date of the last posted maintenance entry.

fields.name: Depr. below Zero %
fields.tooltip: Specifies a percentage if you have selected the Allow Depr. below Zero field in the depreciation book.

fields.name: Projected Disposal Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which you want to dispose of the fixed asset.

fields.name: Projected Proceeds on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected proceeds from disposal of the fixed asset.

fields.name: Depr. Starting Date (Custom 1)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for depreciation of custom 1 entries.

fields.name: Depr. Ending Date (Custom 1)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date for depreciation of custom 1 entries.

fields.name: Accum. Depr. % (Custom 1)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for depreciation of custom 1 entries.

fields.name: Depr. This Year % (Custom 1)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage for depreciation of custom 1 entries for the current year.

fields.name: Property Class (Custom 1)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the property class of the asset.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value in the Description field on the fixed asset card.

fields.name: Main Asset/Component
fields.tooltip: Automatically copies the value from the Main Asset/Component field on the fixed asset card.

fields.name: Component of Main Asset
fields.tooltip: Automatically copies the value from the Component of Main Asset field on the fixed asset card.

fields.name: FA Add.-Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:
If you post in an additional reporting currency, you can click the field to enter the exchange rate that the program will use to convert fixed asset transactions from LCY to the additional reporting currency.
You specify which types of fixed asset transactions (acquisition cost, depreciation and so on) you want the program to record in both LCY and the additional reporting currency in the Use Add.-Curr. Exch. Rate field in the Depreciation Book Card window.

fields.name: Use Half-Year Convention
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Half-Year Convention is to be applied to the selected depreciation method.

fields.name: Use DB% First Fiscal Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the depreciation methods DB1/SL and DB2/SL use the declining balance depreciation amount in the first fiscal year.

fields.name: Temp. Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the period during which a temporary fixed depreciation amount will be used.

fields.name: Temp. Fixed Depr. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies a temporary fixed depreciation amount.

fields.name: Ignore Def. Ending Book Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the default ending book value is ignored, and the value in the Ending Book Value is used.

fields.name: Use Bonus Depreciation
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the bonus depreciation should be used in this book.

fields.name: Bonus Depr. Applied Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of bonus depreciation that has been applied to the fixed asset.

fields.name: Bonus Depreciation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bonus depreciation percentage for this fixed asset.

fields.name: Default FA Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depreciation book that is used by default on documents and journals when a fixed asset has more than one depreciation book. A fixed asset can have only one default depreciation book. If a depreciation book is not specified for a fixed asset, the default depreciation book from the fixed asset setup is used.
